title: Making or Breaking Hell / The Discovery of Hell's Mysteries
overview: While carrying out his hellish bureaucratic duties, Hozuki encounters a legendary hero. Hozuki and King Enma dream of taking a trip to Australia.

title: Demons and Underwear and Crabs / The State of Hell, and This and That
overview: Despite being tasked with cleaning the rivers of hell, low-ranking demon Nasubi becomes distracted by a song. King Enma welcomes a guest from Europe.

title: Hakutakuk / How Their Discord Came to Be
overview: Ignoring King Enma’s advice, Momotaro's companions risk visiting Hozuki on his day off. King Enma reveals why Hozuki and Hakutaku are always at odds.

title: Pretty Boys Need Love Too / Kajika Hell
overview: Accompanied by Shiro, Hozuki departs for the Karasu-Tengu police station. Hozuki teaches the lazy new demon recruits about the art of torture.

title: The Instrumental Duo of the Mighty Rivals / Mental Sports Day
overview: Hozuki and Shiro go on a quest for an essential stew ingredient. The 100th annual Hell’s Minions Sports Day commences with an unconventional bang.

title: Hell Idol: Peach Maki / The Right Arm Blues
overview: Looking for his next scoop, gossip magazine reporter Koban begs Hozuki for an interview. Beelzebub from European hell visits the Japanese underworld.

title: Man and Woman and Mortal Hell / Hell-Style Acupuncture and Moxibustion Techniques and How to Use the Johari Mirror
overview: Hozuki, Karauri and Nasubi visit an area of hell reserved for a certain kind of sinner. King Enma employs the help of Hozuki to receive acupuncture.

title: The Vulgar Battle / The 36 Views of Hell
overview: Koban turns his attention to Peach Maki and Hozuki in crafting his latest gossip article. Hozuki asks Nasubi to create a new mural fit for hell.

title: The Ultimate Example of Ruin Through Wine and Women / Awash With Drunks
overview: Momotaro makes an offhand comment that deals a blow to Hakutaku’s ego. Hozuki helps an eight-headed snake demon deal with a group of drunken sinners.

title: Dinner of the Ten Kings of the Afterlife / Diets are Hell
overview: King Enma holds a dinner for hell's nine other noble judges. Concerned about his weight, King Enma hits the gym with hell’s strictest trainer: Hozuki.

title: The Samurai Who Was Inch-High / Marsh Sisters on the Mountain
overview: After hearing the tale of the “Inch-High Samurai,” Shiro wonders what became of its titular hero. A pint-sized spirit comes to Hozuki with a problem.

title: Lady Lillith and her Husband / Why Monsters are so Widely-Spread Throughout the Mundane World of China
overview: Western she-devil Lady Lilith visits the Japanese underworld on a shopping trip. Hakutaku recalls the time he drunkenly fell into the mortal world.

title: Hell's Bon Festival of Lights / Idle Chat with the Great King Enma
overview: Shiro and his pals Rurio and Kakisuke experience their first-ever festival in hell. King Enma and Hozuki kill time until their next batch of sinners.

title: Ancient Underworld Overhaul / The Palace with the Malice
overview: As Lord Enma passes judgement on the denizens of hell, Hozuki's past is revealed. Has he always been a demon?

title: Hell Minion for a Day / The Line Between Workaholic and Artist
overview: Hozuki takes Maki and Miki around as hell minions to capture special tortures never seen before on film!

title: The Auspicious Alliance / Eccentric Cuckoo-land Creature
overview: The Four Benevolent Beasts argue over a meal about who is older and how well they are aging. Meanwhile, Hozuki has some problems of his own down in Hell.

title: The Legend of Mustard / Please Turnip for the Demon Parade
overview: Koban the paparazzo gets an interview with Mustard. When Hozuki gets involved in the interview as well, Koban gets far more of a performance than he bargained for.

title: Ono no Takamura / Great King Enma and Anecdotes
overview: After continually being mistaken for the Great King Enma, King Shinko muses about how he should differ himself to avoid future confusion with the deceased.

title: Princess Sakuya's Showtime / The Battle of Children's Limbo
overview: We get a look at Young Hozuki and what he was like when he was younger. Later, Hozuki has to deal with some children who ended up in Hell.

title: In Those Days You Were Always On Edge / Dr. Monkshood
overview: The inventions and ideas of the Engineering Department are being discussed while Young Hozuki tries to make sense of it all.

title: Hopping Vampire
overview: Young Hozuki accidentally discovers the dead and meets quite a unique King with an extraordinary power.

title: Snow Demon / The Offices of Boring
overview: A showdown arises between the Cold Hells and the Hot Hells. Meanwhile, Hozuki unravels the path of how the deceased enter hell.

title: Kagachi's Coolheadedness / Married to His Work
overview: Hozuki is questioned about his humdrum, daily program in the normal world. Meanwhile, the Gods demonstrate their extraordinary matchmaking capabilities.

title: Family / The Hounds of Hell
overview: Hozuki, with great reluctance, agrees to take a vacation for the weekend. In the meantime, the dogs bicker as they try to distinguish themselves amongst each other.

title: King Gokan's Chief of Staff / Hell's Hot Springs
overview: Shiro discovers the mighty Scales of Karma and yearns to do one more thing that will make him an accomplished dog of hell.

title: Master of Hell / Have a Drink and Get Some Rest
overview: The arrival of a special guest brings an unceasing barrage of annoyances as Hozuki prepares for the end of year party.

title: The Day-to-Day at the Offices of Enma / 1 Soup, 3 Dishes, 10 Meats
overview: Hozuki conducts interviews while dealing with a fraud and all the newcomers.

title: What is a Magical Girl? / Indulging in Western Clothing
overview: Learning about witches and girls western clothing bring about a whole new set of annoyances for Hozuki.

title: Dakini of the Welcoming Committee / Under the Sod
overview: Dealing with flesh-eating demons is a lot easier than receiving a vaccination (only if you're Hozuki, of course).

title: The Man Who Learned From Yokai / The Woman Who Makes Use of Yokai
overview: Love is a complicated thing, especially when the police and eons of family feuding are involved. Leave it to Hozuki to talk about...employee benefits?

title: Amanojaku / Go Home, Crane
overview: A stranded crane presents a set of holy and annoying problems for Hozuki, who was only trying to be... nice?

title: Slippery as a Catfish / Gon Gets to Work
overview: Hozuki learns that self-deprecation and laziness isn’t just for the Mundane world but is still just as annoying. How… tragic.

title: Games / Mechanical Chief of Staff
overview: Shiro, Rurio and Kakisuke take some time off at the Arcade and run into some interesting people. Hozuki has to entertain some new guests, hooray?

title: The Rabbit Called Mustard / Types
overview: The tiny and hellishly mighty Mustard describes her typical day of writing in her diary, looking for a partner and torturing souls.

title: Yakan Siblings / Shiro's Butt is in a Real Jam
overview: Hozuki, the ever eccentric man, is invited to teach young children about Hell. What could possibly go awry?

title: Fundamentally / Mixed Martial Arts Contest
overview: After some intense training with Hozuki, Mustard is ready for battle (even if her opponents are less than awake)!

title: The Stripping Hag and Clothes-hanging Geezer / Chef Miki
overview: Hozuki teaches the hell minions about the old people that dwell at the Sanzu River bank and the monsters within, but it proves to be more of a headache than anticipated.

title: Onki / Animals Don't Forget One's Kindness
overview: Momotaro returns to the fabled Ogre Island in response to a recent incident. Later, Hozuki visits the court of King Shoko, where animals are called as material witnesses.

title: Unrivaled at Poker / Is Hell Your Intended Destination?
overview: Hozuki uses the apathetic nature of the Zashiki Warashi twins to wrangle a newcomer to Hell. Later, Hozuki settles a disagreement between different departments.
